title: Business Operations Manager (International)
source: Numeral Ashby job board via AI Operators newsletter (WebSearch discovery)
requirements_met: 5+ years operations experience at fintech/SaaS/compliance startups: Ryan ~8yr incl. ops at early-stage Minima
Build structured processes in early-stage environments: Ryan was first employee at Minima
Process automation familiarity (Sheets, AppScript, RPA, AI agents): Ryan builds AI agents with Claude Code, strong data analytics
Strong stakeholder and vendor management: Ryan has GTM/founder-facing experience
2+ years remote in globally distributed teams: Ryan open to remote (partial evidence)
gaps: Indirect tax (VAT/GST) compliance domain knowledge not in Ryan's background
Accounting/finance/tax degree preferred and not held
preferred_met: AI tool / automation agent implementation experience: Ryan builds AI agents
SQL / relational database proficiency: covered by data analytics background (partial)

experience_fit.calculation: Role 5+yr; Ryan ~8yr = one-level stretch up / overqualified (10)

industry_match.calculation: Self-described largest AI-native tax solution = direct AI industry match

location_match.calculation: EMEA remote; Ryan UK and open to remote (10)

notes: Numeral (Benchmark + YC backed, founded 2023) self-describes as the largest, fastest-growing AI-native tax solution; role owns end-to-end international launches using RPA, SQL and AI agents.
